channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Trail Blazers take to the court for the first time after coach Chauncey Billups' arrest
item.description: PORTLAND, Ore. (AP) — Stunned by the arrest of head coach Chauncey Billups in a sprawling alleged poker scheme, the Portland Trail Blazers took to the court Friday night under an interim coach as they navigated an unexpectedly tumultuous start to the new season.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Luka Doncic scores 49 to extend his sizzling season start in Lakers' 128-110 win over Timberwolves
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 49 points and became the fourth player in NBA history to begin a season with back-to-back 40-point performances, leading the Los Angeles Lakers to a 128-110 victory over the Minnesota Timberwolves on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Blue Jays' Addison Barger hits first pinch-hit grand slam in World Series history
item.description: Toronto Blue Jays outfielder Addison Barger launched the first pinch-hit grand slam in World Series history during Game 1 against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Ian Harrison, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Blue Jays rookie Trey Yesavage holds down Dodgers for 4 innings in historic World Series start
item.description: Standout rookie starter Trey Yesavage didn’t have his best stuff but limited the Los Angeles Dodgers to two runs over four innings for the Toronto Blue Jays in Game 1 of the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Ian Harrison, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Three former Eastern Michigan basketball players defied sports betting probe, NCAA says
item.description: An NCAA probe into suspicious betting on Eastern Michigan games appeared to stall amid three former players refusal to cooperate with investigators.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver 'deeply disturbed' by gambling arrests of Billups and Rozier
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver, in his first public comments since the arrests of Portland coach Chauncey Billups and Miami guard Terry Rozier on gambling-related charges, said Friday night that he was stunned by the indictments that have rocked the league.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL hits Giants with hefty fines for concussion protocol violation during Eagles game
item.description: The NFL and NFLPA announced in a joint statement that the New York Giants, head coach Brian Daboll, and running back Cam Skattebo were fined for violating the concussion protocol.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Alabama QB AJ McCarron announces run for Lieutenant Governor
item.description: McCarron was with the Tide for five years, winning back-to-back National Championships under coach Nick Saban.
item.dc:creator: Maggie Matteson, NewsNation

item.title: Mark Sanchez's attorneys participate in initial hearing in Marion County court
item.description: During the hearing, officials confirmed dates listed in the court records for Sanchez's upcoming legal proceedings.
item.dc:creator: David Gay, NewsNation

item.title: Former NFL player who died in police custody battled injuries and mental health challenges
item.description: Martin, 36, died after what police described as a “brief struggle” with officers who arrested him early Saturday while investigating a break-in at a home. He became unresponsive and was pronounced dead at a hospital, Oakland police said. A cause of death has not been released.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER and MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Women's pro baseball league picks San Francisco for new team
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Women's professional sports are thriving in San Francisco. The city just marked its first season with a WNBA team, the Golden State Valkyries. Starting next year, San Francisco Giants fans will have another home team to root for.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Former NFL All-Pro running back Doug Martin dead at 36
item.description: Martin’s family released a statement saying, “It is with great sadness to inform you all that Doug Martin passed away Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, NewsNation
